text: Inside these modern, angular spaces, I am struck by the juxtaposition of order and creative energy. The glass, the polished floors, and the meticulous fire safety equipment speak to a dedication to safety and clarity—a kind of architectural honesty. Moving into the R&D exhibit, the colorful wall and interactive displays evoke curiosity and a forward-looking spirit. Being here feels both grounding and invigorating; as if logic and imagination are equally nurtured. I sense an invitation to ponder progress, and my mind stirs with questions about how research and technology shape us.
